Sport

Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics Archived Stories Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Arath Brito

3 Ja'Queze Kirby

  • Position Forward
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 190
  • Class Senior
  • Hometown Hazelhurst, Ga.
  • High School Davis HS
  • Previous School Augusta
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

Before ASU
Played three seasons at Division II Augusta, scoring 1,113 points on 48.5 percent shooting from the field and 39.2 percent shooting from three...averaged 5.5 rebounds and one steal per game...as a freshman in 2011-22, helped Augusta go 33-4 to win the Peach Belt Conference and the NCAA Southeast regional...started in 2022 National Championship game, scoring seven points and grabbing nine rebounds in the loss to Northwest Missouri State...named to Elite Eight All-Tournament Team...started career at Division I Murray State...back-to-back 2A Georgia Player of the Year by the Georgia Basketball Coaches Association at Jeff Davis HS.

Personal
Son of Marquita Clemens and Jason Kirby...has four brothers: Ahmod, Jalen, Jashawn, and Tyree; and, four sisters: Octavia, Kalyla, Nijae, and Jasmine...pursuing master's degree in Coaching, Sport, Recreation, and Fitness Administration.
